query: soft focus dreamy out of focus defocused portrait
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: soft focus dreamy defocused portraits

response.objective_caption: Out-of-focus image of circular bokeh lights in warm yellow and cool green tones, with indistinct vertical shapes suggesting tree trunks or branches behind layered translucent foliage.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An intentionally blurred photograph of a forest scene rendered almost entirely as soft circular bokeh orbs, with warm yellow light bleeding through indistinct vertical tree forms against a muted green canopy, dissolving all detail into abstract pools of light and color with a dreamy, impressionistic quality.
